name: Player Counter
description: Shows the live number of connected players (and up to 5 names) on each server's overview for six supported games — Minecraft (Java + Bedrock), Valheim, 7 Days to Die, ARK: Survival Ascended & Evolved, and Palworld — via a self-hosted GameDig sidecar (ARK & Palworld counted over RCON). Includes an egg whitelist and a bilingual Docker setup guide.
author: Peregrine
